name: Spicy Peanut Yogurt Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peanut butter and yogurt in a bowl.
2. Mix until smooth.
3. Stir in the coriander, cayenne pepper, and pepper.
4. Blend well to combine all ingredients.
5. Cover the mixture and chill in the refrigerator.
6. The dip will yield about 1 1/4 cups once chilled.
